allow: Bash(node --input-type=module --eval "import mongoose from 'mongoose'; console.log\('mongoose version:', mongoose.version\)")

Bash(node -e "const dns = require\('dns'\); dns.resolveSrv\('_mongodb._tcp.cluster0.olp7xmx.mongodb.net', \(err, addrs\) => { if\(err\) console.error\('SRV failed:', err.code, err.message\); else console.log\('SRV ok:', addrs\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const dns = require\('dns'\); dns.setServers\(['8.8.8.8', '8.8.4.4']\); dns.resolveSrv\('_mongodb._tcp.cluster0.olp7xmx.mongodb.net', \(err, addrs\) => { if\(err\) console.error\('SRV failed:', err.code, err.message\); else console.log\(JSON.stringify\(addrs, null, 2\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const dns = require\('dns'\); dns.setServers\(['8.8.8.8']\); dns.resolveTxt\('cluster0.olp7xmx.mongodb.net', \(err, r\) => { if\(err\) console.error\(err.message\); else console.log\(r\); }\)")
